title: always_comb is always called, even in case no change in sensitivity list

features.name: always_comb triggered by always_ff assigned variables
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that reads variables (state, next) assigned via non-blocking assignment in an always_ff block, where a counter (i) stops incrementing after reaching a threshold

features.name: always_comb with case statement and enum state
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with a case statement that assigns to variables also used in an always_ff block, where the case expression involves an enum-typed state variable

features.name: shared variable between always_ff and always_comb
features.description: Code should include variables that are read in always_comb and assigned in always_ff, where the always_ff counter stops modifying the shared variables at a threshold, causing always_comb to re-evaluate improperly
